_comment: Golden fixture parity snapshot (anokye-labs/kbexplorer-engine#18 acceptance criteria): captured by running kbexplorer-template's actual scripts/validate-graph.js (commit 374bb0630af22c3dc53034d872fbc70a197b552a) and scripts/assess-graph.js (commit 831d0985b385f67a7bb72b78d3adc57d8c5a551c) from anokye-labs/kbexplorer-template@main against ./graph-analysis-repo, with a small appended capture block (writeFileSync of the in-scope variables as JSON) replacing each script's console-log-only summary — the validation/scoring LOGIC itself is untouched. This is a committed snapshot, not regenerated at test time, so the parity test has no network/CLI dependency and no drift risk from template changes landing silently. assess-graph.js was captured with --gate semantics always evaluated (the real script only evaluates gate scoring when passed '--gate'; scores/suggestions are identical either way).
